$comment: Throwaway profile for testing Switchboard on the SAME machine as a production install WITHOUT colliding with it. Pass with `-c switchboard.config.test.json` (or SWITCHBOARD_CONFIG). Foreground only; NEVER run `install-daemon` with this — the install-daemon guard refuses a non-default tmux.socket anyway. Signal/IronCurtain/Tailscale are disabled and the tmux socket + state dirs are isolated so nothing touches the production daemon, account, or panes.
